title: A Day in the Life
why_this_song: A Day in the Life by The Beatles (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I read the news today, oh boy
About a lucky man who made the grade
And though the news was rather sad
Well I just had to laugh
I'd love to turn you on

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "read" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "read" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "news" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "news" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I read the news today, oh boy
If he was from the House of Lords
And looking up I noticed I was late

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: About a lucky man who made the grade
But I just had to look
Found my coat and grabbed my hat

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "A Day in the Life" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "A Day in the Life" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
